metadata.description: Allows offline players to join LAN worlds by disabling Mojang authentication (online-mode) on the host. Default is offline-mode; enable requireMojangAuthentication to restore online-mode.
metadata.name: Allow Offline Players (LAN)

warnings: 1.21.2-1.21.8/forge/template does not support exact Minecraft 1.21.2. Supported exact versions: 1.21.3, 1.21.4, 1.21.5, 1.21.6, 1.21.7, 1.21.8
